Call 561-621-5700 Free Consultation

Round-the-Clock Live-In Care in Wellington, Florida

For seniors who need constant supervision, our 24-hour live-in care provides a dedicated caregiver on-site around the clock. From personal care and meals to medication reminders and emergency response, your loved one always has skilled help within arm's reach. Live-in care is often more affordable and more comfortable than facility placement.

Serving the Wellington area in Palm Beach County, our caregivers are background-checked, AHCA-licensed, bonded, and insured. Whether you need a few hours of 24/7 live-in care per week or daily support, we create a personalized care plan that fits your family's needs and budget.

What's Included in 24/7 Live-In Care in Wellington

  • Dedicated caregiver on-site 24 hours a day
  • Night-time assistance — bathroom trips, repositioning, emergencies
  • All meals prepared and medication schedules maintained
  • Continuous safety monitoring and fall prevention
  • Often more affordable than assisted living facilities
  • Your loved one stays in the comfort of their own home

Why Families in Wellington Choose Senior Trusted Home Care

With our headquarters in West Palm Beach and caregivers throughout Palm Beach County, we know the Wellington community. Our local presence means faster response times, caregivers familiar with local hospitals and physicians, and a team that truly understands the needs of Western Communities families.

  • AHCA Licensed #299996655 — Florida state licensed home health agency
  • Bonded and fully insured for your peace of mind
  • All caregivers background-checked and CPR certified
  • Flexible scheduling — hourly, daily, overnight, or live-in
  • Free in-home consultation and care plan assessment
  • Serving Wellington and surrounding areas in Palm Beach County

Frequently Asked Questions: 24/7 Live-In Care in Wellington

How does 24-hour care work?

A dedicated live-in caregiver stays in the home full-time. For continuous awake coverage overnight, we rotate caregivers in shifts to ensure alertness.

Is 24-hour home care cheaper than a nursing home?

In many cases, yes. The average nursing home in Florida costs $8,000-$10,000/month. Live-in home care can be comparable or less, with the benefit of staying in a familiar environment.

What if I need care starting immediately?

We can often begin 24-hour care within 24-48 hours. For urgent situations, we have emergency placement protocols.

Do you serve Wellington, FL?

Yes! Senior Trusted Home Care proudly serves Wellington and all communities in Palm Beach County, Florida. Our caregivers are local and familiar with the area.

How do I get started with 24/7 live-in care in Wellington?

Simply call us at 561-621-5700 or visit our website to request a free consultation. We'll schedule an in-home assessment in Wellington at a time that works for you.

Ready for 24/7 Live-In Care in Wellington?

Call today for a free, no-obligation in-home consultation.

Other Services in Wellington

Companionship Care

Genuine companionship and emotional support to help seniors feel valued, connected, and engaged.

Personal Care

Personalized assistance with bathing, grooming, dressing, toileting, and mobility.

Light Housekeeping

Light cleaning, laundry, meal preparation, and dishwashing so clients can live safely at home.

Medication Reminders

Timely medication reminders and safety checks to help seniors stay on schedule and maintain a secure living environment.
